mapper.select: select ci.id, ci.quantity, ci.total, p.id as product_id, p.name as product_name, p.price as product_price, p.pic as product_pic from cartitem ci left join product p on ci.product_id = p.id where ci.id = #{id}

select ci.id, ci.quantity, ci.total, p.id as product_id, p.name as product_name, p.price as product_price, p.pic as product_pic from cartitem ci left join product p on ci.product_id = p.id where ci.cart_id = #{cartId}
select id from cartitem where cart_id = #{cartId} and product_id = #{productId} limit 1
mapper.update: update cartitem set quantity = #{quantity}, total = #{total} where id = #{cartItemId}
